headline: Your last session ended at 5pm. Why are you still here?
primary_text:
You know the drill. Session ends, client leaves, and you've got 30 minutes of documentation ahead. Multiply that by 6-8 clients, and suddenly it's 8pm and you haven't eaten dinner.

What if your notes wrote themselves?

JotPsych listens to your session and generates complete, HIPAA-compliant clinical notes in under 3 minutes. That's 2 hours back in your day. Every single day.

Built by therapists who lived this grind. We get it. And we fixed it.
description: Try it free on your next session. No credit card. No setup headaches.
